title: Manufacturing Engineer - Tata Steel - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Tata Steel - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!
